creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Before anyone think we are busy or ignore these PRs. We aren't. I am  
planning to touch these PRs when ports tree is complete unfreeze. Right  
now, it's still thaw.

As for this PR, I will fix (when it's complete unfreeze) that empty  
directories that aren't supposed to be create.

+@dirrmtry lib/cucul-sharp
+@dirrmtry lib/caca-sharp

Cheers,
Mezz
